─[ GitHub Pages Frontmatter Required ]─ ┐

name: github-pages-frontmatter-required description: Fix MkDocs navigation YAML errors by adding frontmatter with title to all index.md files user-invocable: false allowed-tools: Read, Edit, Grep, Glob

GitHub Pages Frontmatter Required

Context

Navigation generation fails with a YAML parsing error if index.md files lack frontmatter with a title field. This often happens in auto-generated or converted files.

Snags

Navigation generation creates invalid YAML:

ERROR: expected <block end>, but found ':'
  in mkdocs.yml, line 89, column 13

The malformed entry looks like: - : docs/path/to/index.md. The empty key (before the colon) breaks the parser.

Workaround

Ensure every index.md file has explicit frontmatter with a title field:

---
title: Page Title
---

# Page Title

Gotchas

  • Heading is not enough: Even if the file has a # Title heading, navigation generators (like generate-nav.sh) often only extract the title from frontmatter.
  • Common culprits: Archive index files, template files, and READMEs converted to index files.
  • Bulk Check: find docs -name "index.md" -exec grep -L "^---$" {} \; will find files missing frontmatter.
PgUp/PgDn: scroll b: bulk commands q: quit x: menu ← → ↑ ↓: navigate
Donate 0.24.4
